title: Implement IC-4: No Module Alters Kernel Enforcement Logic
intent: Implement the IC-4 invariant check as specified in tools/ci/invariant-checks.md. Static analysis script verifying that no module package imports from kernel validation or snapshot internals, and that modules cannot register hooks into enforcement logic. Replaces the IC-4 stub in CI with a real enforcement gate.
acceptance_criteria: Completed and accepted prior to factory v0.1 migration
